description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files at $HOME/.cache/pip using a cache key of $CI_PROJECT_NAME. Include the TheLab CI components for review, pre‑commit checks, publishing a GitLab release, and publishing to PyPI. Define two stages: test and release. Add a test job named test that runs in the test stage on the image registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE}, executes in parallel across a matrix of IMAGE values 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, and 3.14 with matching TOX_SKIP_ENV regexes, runs the shell commands "uv sync" and "uv run tox", captures coverage using the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/ and only triggers when the commit is on a protected branch or is a merge‑request event. The release stage is provided by the included components, which automatically publish a GitLab release and upload the built package to PyPI.
